login.heading: Welcome Back
login.subheading: Sign in to your account using your registered phone number and password.
login.heroQuote: Secure access to your account, anytime, anywhere. Your data is protected with bank-grade encryption.
login.heroFooter: Trusted by thousands across Suez Marketplace
login.successDescription: You have successfully signed in to your account.

registration.heading: Finance that moves at the speed of Egypt.
registration.description: Join thousands who manage, send, and grow their money with a single secure account.
registration.highlightsVerifiedDescription: Every account is secured with phone verification.
registration.highlightsSecurityDescription: Your data is encrypted end to end, always.
registration.highlightsFastDescription: A fast, friendly onboarding built for mobile.
registration.title: Create your account
registration.cardDescription: Enter your Egyptian mobile number and set a password to get started.
registration.phoneDescription: Egyptian numbers only — starting with 010, 011, 012 or 015.
registration.phoneVerifiedMessage: Phone number verified successfully (DEV: Used 0000 as OTP)
registration.phoneRequiredNotice: Phone verification required before creating account (DEV: Use 0000 as OTP)
registration.emailInput: Email (optional) - used only if you forget your password
registration.successDescription: Your account has been created and your phone number is verified.
registration.errorPhonePrefix: Phone number must start with 010, 011, 012, or 015
registration.errorPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
registration.errorPhoneVerification: Please verify your phone number before creating an account
registration.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
